customEffect.hlslSource: cbuffer Constants : register(b0){    float Switch;};Texture2D A : register(t0);Texture2D B : register(t1);SamplerState Sampler0 : register(s0);// D2D provides TEXCOORD in pixel/scene space, not [0,1] UV space.// Use GetDimensions() to normalize before calling Sample().float4 main(    float4 pos : SV_POSITION,    float4 uv0 : TEXCOORD0,    float4 uv1 : TEXCOORD1) : SV_TARGET{    float w0, h0;    A.GetDimensions(w0, h0);    float4 color0 = A.Sample(Sampler0, uv0.xy / float2(w0, h0));    float w1, h1;    B.GetDimensions(w1, h1);    float4 color1 = B.Sample(Sampler0, uv1.xy / float2(w1, h1));    float4 output = (color0 * (1 - Switch)) + (color1 * Switch);    return output;}
